title: Customized NGE Wall Scrolls
wikitext:
[]: Customized NGE Wall Scrolls             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun May 29, 2011 12:27 pm Does anyone know of a way to make customized wall scrolls? I've been wanting to take this picture and turn it into a wall scroll for awhile now, but I don't know of any reliable way to do it. On a related note, does anyone still sell NGE wall scrolls in any quantity? I've seen some around, but nowhere nearly as many I'd expect for such a popular show.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sun May 29, 2011 12:51 pm There is this instruction guide on how to make wall scrolls.. But there is this paper which you can iron, and the picture comes out. Perhaps you can print the picture on the paper, and try to iron it onto a blank scroll? I'd keep a fire extinguisher at the ready..

Article: Customized NGE Wall Scrolls
[]: Customized NGE Wall Scrolls             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun May 29, 2011 12:27 pm Does anyone know of a way to make customized wall scrolls? I've been wanting to take this picture and turn it into a wall scroll for awhile now, but I don't know of any reliable way to do it. On a related note, does anyone still sell NGE wall scrolls in any quantity? I've seen some around, but nowhere nearly as many I'd expect for such a popular show.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sun May 29, 2011 12:51 pm There is this instruction guide on how to make wall scrolls.. But there is this paper which you can iron, and the picture comes out. Perhaps you can print the picture on the paper, and try to iron it onto a blank scroll? I'd keep a fire extinguisher at the ready..
